series_metadata.series_description: Monthly reports include: number of applications received, number of permits issued, and fees received. Previous record series 734-009 entitled "Monthly Reports" will now be under the 744 series for the Division of Mineral Resources Management,due to legislation changes that combined the division.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in division database risk based data management system (RBDMS). may generate roports as needed by state
